endpoint: platform channel helpers (internal, not a route)
summary: In-memory token + chatSession cache with single-flight + 401 authRetry. Used by generate (platform models) and edit (no-mask platform models). NOT directly exposed as a route; testable via mock platform endpoint in P1-c.

moduleState.vars: mivoPlatformToken, mivoPlatformChatSessionId, mivoPlatformTokenPromise, mivoPlatformChatSessionPromise (L594-L597) — in-memory only, never persisted
moduleState.ctx: PlatformCtx {platformKey, platformEndpoint} L599; endpoint default https://aigc.xindong.com (L1624)

testableItems.name: token single-flight (mivoPlatformEnsureToken)
testableItems.behavior: If mivoPlatformToken is null, exactly one mivoPlatformRefreshToken call is in flight (mivoPlatformTokenPromise); concurrent callers await the same promise. On settle, promise is cleared (L626-L628).
testableItems.p1cTest: Mock platform endpoint; fire 2+ concurrent ensureToken; assert exactly 1 POST /api/v1/state/token.

testableItems.name: chatSession single-flight (mivoPlatformEnsureChatSession)
testableItems.behavior: If mivoPlatformChatSessionId is null, exactly one chat-creation call in flight (mivoPlatformChatSessionPromise); concurrent callers share it. On success, caches id; on settle, promise cleared (L650-L652).
testableItems.p1cTest: Mock platform; fire 2+ concurrent ensureChatSession; assert exactly 1 POST /api/v1/message/chat.

testableItems.name: 401 → refresh token → retry EXACTLY ONCE (mivoPlatformFetch)
testableItems.behavior: On 401: nulls cached token + tokenPromise → ensureToken (single-flight refresh) → retries the original request ONCE. If retry also 401/fails, returns that failure (NO second retry, NO llm-proxy fallback).
testableItems.p1cTest: Mock platform returning 401 on first call, 200 on second → assert exactly 2 fetches, success. Mock returning 401 twice → assert exactly 2 fetches, error propagated (no third call).

testableItems.name: submit/poll/signUrl/upload/chat all go through authRetry
testableItems.behavior: submit (L691), poll (L718), signUrl (L747), upload (L773), chat (L638) all call mivoPlatformFetch → all inherit the 401-refresh-once semantics uniformly.

testableItems.name: upload failure → 502 desensitized (in edit path)
testableItems.behavior: mivoPlatformUploadOne throw (4xx/5xx/no fileId) is caught in proxyMivoEdit → 502 {error:'参考图上传失败，请重试或移除参考图'} (fixed copy, does NOT fall into outer 500 catch).

testableItems.name: no-fallback invariant (platform failure never reaches llm-proxy)
testableItems.behavior: All platform errors (submit/poll/download/upload) surface as 502/504 to the client; code never falls through to the llm-proxy branch for platform models.
testableItems.sourceRef: runMivoPlatformImageJob L817-L853 returns handled=true in every terminal branch; generate L894-L896 / edit L989-L990 return on handled

testableItems.name: poll loop semantics
testableItems.behavior: Polls /api/v1/message/<jobId> every 2.5s up to 175s deadline; aborted (client disconnect) → returns {status:'aborted'}; completed → {images}; failed → {error sanitized}; deadline → {status:'timeout'}.
testableItems.sourceRef: mivoPlatformPollJob L707-L742; interval L582; deadline L583; sanitizePlatformError L601-L605

testableItems.name: download signUrl parsing
testableItems.behavior: signUrl response may be raw string, quoted string, or JSON {url|signUrl|data.url}; protocol-relative '//host' prefixed with 'https:'. Non-http result → throw.

discrepancies: Plan §6.1 lists these as '可测项' (testable items) — for the baseline they are code-derived. P1-c must add mock-platform unit tests (the live platform endpoint cannot be safely hit without a real key).
In-memory cache means BFF must run single-instance to preserve single-flight semantics until P4 horizontal scaling (plan risk table acknowledges this).
